ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complexes" (
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complex */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein that the complex belongs to */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the complex */,
  "labels" REAL /* Labels associated with the complex */,
  "stoichiometry" TEXT /* Stoichiometry of the complex */,
  "assembly_type" TEXT /* Type of assembly (e.g., homo, hetero) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complexes_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chain */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complex that the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the chain */,
  "protein_chain" TEXT /* Protein chain associated with the chain */,
  "sequence_identity" REAL /* Sequence identity of the chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binding_sites" (
  "binding_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binding site */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chain that the binding site belongs to */,
  "binding_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the binding site */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Binding affinity of the binding site */,
  "druggability" REAL /* Druggability score of the binding site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_sites_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fold_ids" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fold ID */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complex that the fold ID belongs to */,
  "fold_name" TEXT /* Name of the fold ID */,
  "fold_description" TEXT /* Description of the fold ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fold_ids_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., protein-ligand, protein-protein) */,
  "binding_energy" REAL /* Binding energy of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein1_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein1_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein2_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein2_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein that the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_annotations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complex_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complex that the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complex_annotations_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chain_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chain that the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chain_annotations_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ligands" (
  "ligand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ligand */,
  "ligand_name" TEXT /* Name of the ligand */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the ligand */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the ligand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ligand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_ligand_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein in the interaction */,
  "ligand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ligand in the interaction */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Binding affinity of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., competitive, non-competitive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_ligand_interactions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_ligand_interactions_ligand_id FOREIGN KEY ("ligand_id") REFERENCES ligands ("ligand_id")
)
